member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Controllers.QueryController
member.summary: API controller for executing SQL queries

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Controllers.QueryController.ExecuteQuery(SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and returns results in JSON format
member.param: The query request containing SQL and pagination parameters
member.returns: Query results with metadata and pagination information

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Controllers.QueryController.Health
member.summary: Health check endpoint

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Exceptions.DatabaseException
member.summary: Exception thrown when database operations fail

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Exceptions.InvalidQueryException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a SQL query is invalid or dangerous

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Models.PaginationInfo
member.summary: Pagination information for query results

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest
member.summary: Request model for executing SQL queries

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest.Query
member.summary: The SQL query to execute

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest.PageNumber
member.summary: Page number for pagination (default: 1)

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest.PageSize
member.summary: Page size for pagination (default: 100, max: 1000)

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Connection timeout in seconds (default: 30)

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse
member.summary: Response model for SQL query results

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the query executed successfully

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.Data
member.summary: Query execution result data

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.TotalRows
member.summary: Total number of rows in the result set

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.PageNumber
member.summary: Current page number

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.PageSize
member.summary: Number of rows per page

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages available

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the query failed

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.StackTrace
member.summary: Stack trace for debugging purposes (only in development)

member.name: P:SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryResponse.ExecutionTimeMs
member.summary: Execution time in milliseconds

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Services.QueryValidatorService
member.summary: Service for validating SQL queries for security and correctness

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.QueryValidatorService.ValidateQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a SQL query for security and correctness
member.returns: True if the query is valid for execution
member.exception: Thrown if the query is invalid or dangerous

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.QueryValidatorService.ContainsDangerousKeywords(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the query contains dangerous keywords

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.QueryValidatorService.ContainsSuspiciousPatterns(System.String)
member.summary: Checks for SQL injection and other suspicious patterns

member.name: T:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService
member.summary: Service for executing SQL queries against SQL Server database

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService.ExecuteQueryAsync(SqlQueryAPI.Models.QueryRequest)
member.summary: Executes a SQL query and returns the results as a list of dictionaries
member.param: Query request containing SQL and pagination info
member.returns: Query response with results and metadata

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService.GetRowCountAsync(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the total row count for a query

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService.ExecuteDataQueryAsync(Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Executes a query and returns results as a list of dictionaries

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService.BuildCountQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a COUNT query from the original SELECT query

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService.BuildPaginatedQuery(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a paginated query using OFFSET and FETCH

member.name: M:SqlQueryAPI.Services.SqlQueryService.RemoveOrderByClause(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the ORDER BY clause from a query (for counting)
